articles.title: Tarris Reed Jr. has 31 points and 27 rebounds as No. 2 UConn beats Furman 82-71 in NCAA Tournament
articles.original_title: Tarris Reed Jr. has 31 points and 27 rebounds as No. 2 UConn beats Furman 82-71 in NCAA Tournament
articles.summary: Tarris Reed Jr. put up monster numbers — 31 points and 27 rebounds, the kind of sensational stat line not seen in the NCAA Tournament in nearly 60 years — that saved UConn from the upset of this March.  “I feel like I let my foot off the gas a little bit in the second half,” Reed said.  Maybe Reed can pump the brakes on the modesty.

articles.title: Thorns down NWSL rival Reign 2-0 despite a pair of red cards
articles.original_title: Thorns down NWSL rival Reign 2-0 despite a pair of red cards
articles.summary: Pietra Tordin and Reilyn Turner each had a goal and the Portland Thorns downed the Seattle Reign 2-0 on Friday night despite having two players sent off with red cards.  In other NWSL games, the Orlando Pride and the visiting Denver Summit played to a 1-1 draw; and the Washington Spirit tied 2-2 with Racing Louisville.
